notes: Captures the dual-specimen layout and rough mantle/fin proportions but the arms and tentacles are fused into blob silhouettes with no individuated appendages or suckers, falling well short of an FAO plate.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles merged into single mass — individual arm pairs not separable
no ring suckers visible along arms
eye reduced to a tiny dot rather than almond with defined pupil
stipple is scattered noise rather than coherent chromatophore fields
fin outline jagged and broken, not a clean continuous curve
random short dashes across mantle read as photo-trace clutter, not scientific stipple
arm count from photo not preserved in either specimen
silhouette outline has spurious notches and protrusions inconsistent with the photo
